logo.alt: Rethink Aadhaar — red square with white eye/sun mark
logo.note: Re-created as inline SVG from the original Squarespace logo asset; the original was raster (PNG).

footer_rays.alt: Black field with white sun-rays / starburst radiating up from bottom-centre
footer_rays.note: Re-created as inline SVG so it scales cleanly. 60 thin rays.

take_action_icon.alt: Fist with network nodes — take action icon

media_directory.note: All squarespace-cdn images from the live site, downloaded once. Filenames preserve their CDN hash so they can be cross-referenced with the raw HTML in /content-source/raw.
